name: Adrian Andersen
title: Industrial Engineer & Operations Strategist
description: Strategic Industrial Engineer with dual Norwegian-Peruvian background. Master's candidate in Operations Management specializing in Lean methodologies, data-driven optimization, and cross-cultural operational excellence.
tagline: Bridging technical rigor with international commercial viability.
aboutMe:
I'm an Industrial Engineer with a dual Norwegian-Peruvian background, currently completing my Master's in Operations Management in Valencia, Spain. My professional identity is defined by a data-first mindset and a relentless drive for operational excellence. I specialize in bridging the gap between technical rigor and international commercial viability.

But there's more to me than spreadsheets and process flows. On the golf course, I practice strategic precision. At the piano, I balance mathematical structure with creative fluidity. Whether I'm cheering for Liverpool FC or hiking through forests, I believe a well-rounded professional is a more effective leader. I don't just look for a job — I look for a mentorship environment where I can absorb high-level knowledge and extract the maximum potential from every challenge.
